## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between Flosum and GrowthX to align on SEO and content strategy goals and processes.](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Primary focus on data backup content creation, with some DevOps content refresh](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Target of 50,000+ words per month, roughly 8 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [GrowthX to run initial keyword research and gap analysis before next strategy session](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Calibration phase starts next week with a few initial articles for thorough review](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Strategy and Performance

  - [Flosum operates in 3 main areas: DevOps, data backup, and security (focusing on first two)](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=2265.0)
  - [Primary competitors: Gearset and Capado for DevOps; OwnBackup (Salesforce-acquired) for data backup](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=2318.0)
  - [January traffic spike due to PR campaign; website transition in mid-November improved performance](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=2129.0)
  - [Current content generation process is human-only, causing bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=2949.0)

### Content Goals and Focus Areas

  - [Increase visibility in data backup space, especially with OwnBackup customers potentially looking for alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=2454.0)
  - [Balance between DevOps (higher ASP) and data backup (larger TAM) content](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=2501.0)
  - [Consider experimenting with content for ancillary products (e.g., data masking, data seeding)](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=2742.0)
  - [Aim to improve brand awareness and traffic within Salesforce ecosystem](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=2282.0)

### GrowthX Workflow and Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to move relevant documents to shared workspace](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=2568.0)
  - [Initial keyword research and gap analysis to be conducted](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=2107.0)
  - [Selection of articles for calibration phase](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Gradual ramp-up of content production over coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=3173.0)
  - [Weekly 30-minute progress meetings to be scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)

### Attribution and Metrics

  - [Flosum uses tools like Bizible (Marketo Measure) for attribution](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
  - [Can track organic search traffic and attribute pipeline to specific engagements](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
  - [GrowthX to align on specific success metrics and reporting](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Flosum team to review and provide feedback on company brief, personas, and competitor list](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=2069.0)
  - [GrowthX to follow up on how-to guides and video demo examples](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=2901.0)
  - [Flosum to share any AI content polishing instructions if available](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=3189.0)
  - [Schedule next strategy session (likely Wednesday/Thursday next week)](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=3233.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin initial keyword research and content gap analysis](https://fathom.video/share/ci_rAbsR7F7vrzgsiV1AzqH5EBt3h2-F?tab=summary&timestamp=2107.0)
